rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Whoami Recon Writing Output to File

rules.rule_text:
title: Whoami Recon Writing Output to File
id: abcdf274-2fbd-4736-a16b-032fcac54eee
status: experimental
description: "SocGholish employs several scripted reconnaissance commands. While much\
  \ of this activity \noccurs in memory, one that stands out is the execution of whoami\
  \ with the output redirected \nto a local temp file with the naming convention rad<5-hex-chars>.tmp.\
  \ Part of the RedCanary \n2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/socgholish/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1033
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \wscript.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains: whoami /all >>
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
